name: Chocolate Cherry Bars
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2 Grease and flour a 9x13 inch pan.
3 In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients for the bars: fudge cake mix, cherry pie filling, almond extract, and beaten eggs. Stir until mixed thoroughly.
4 Spread the batter evenly in the prepared pan.
5 Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set. Do not over-bake.
6 Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
7 For frosting: In a small saucepan, combine sugar, butter (or margarine), and milk. Heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture boils for about 1 minute.
8 Remove from heat and stir in semi-sweet chocolate chips until smooth.
9 Pour the cooled frosting evenly over the baked bars.
10 Allow to cool completely before serving.
